description: Example evals for the Verdant corpus. Three kinds of case: per-collection retrieval hits, filter-specific queries (Analyze should extract a facet), and out-of-scope questions that MUST refuse. Replace these with cases for your own corpus. Expectations: `retrieve` lists doc ids (collection/docSlug) that must appear among retrieved chunks; `filter` is a partial facet match that Analyze must extract; `refuse` requires the pipeline to route to Refuse.
